title: Animals Plus
description: A resource pack that updates Minecraft’s sheep, cow, chicken, and pig models with a polished, modern look, enhancing visuals while keeping the classic style intact. Perfect for players seeking subtle, high-quality upgrades!
body:
This resource pack updates the classic Minecraft mob models for sheep, cows, chickens, and pigs, bringing them up to modern standards! 

Each animal has been carefully redesigned to have a fresh, polished look that maintains Minecraft's original charm while adding more detail and character. 

Perfect for players who love the vanilla experience but want a touch of visual enhancement, this pack seamlessly integrates with the game's aesthetic and keeps performance in mind. Enjoy a world where your farm animals look better than ever!
